title: Districts collection (per state)
description: All districts within a single state, keyed by LGD (Local Government Directory) code where available, falling back to a Wikipedia-derived slug. Each file covers exactly one state.

x-changelog.description: Initial schema. Per-state district list with LGD/Wikipedia identifier, name, creation date, split-from lineage, source citation.
Replaced optional source_url with required source field (top-level) and optional source override on items per provenance contract (CLAUDE.md §12).
Replaced single source string with sources array of {url, fetched_at} per ADR-0002. Empty array means hand-authored. Item-level source overrides removed.

Additive: optional name (human-readable upstream name) and authority (issuing body) fields on each sources[] entry. Aligns with Phase A schemas (feature_collection.metadata, indicator) so attribution can be uniform across electoral and socio-economic data. Per TODO/SOCIO-ECONOMIC-EXPANSION.md §6 D3.

Additive: optional lgd_code (LGD numeric district code, string) on each district item. Set during backfill from datasets/reference/in/lgd/districts-latest.csv (ramSeraph opendata mirror). Independent of id/id_source so wikipedia-slug ids stay stable for cross-file references in constituencies.json. lgd_code is the join key against datasets/boundaries/in/geojson/india-districts.geojson where features carry dist_lgd. Per ADR-0015 (LGD as district authority) and ADR-0019 (district_lgd_code dataset column).

sources.description: Provenance per CLAUDE.md §12 / ADR-0002. Each entry is one upstream URL plus the timestamp our pipeline fetched it. An empty array signals hand-authored content.

name.description: Optional human-readable name of the upstream (e.g. "Statistical Report on General Election to Legislative Assembly of Tamil Nadu, 2021").

authority.description: Optional issuing authority (e.g. "Election Commission of India").

state.description: ECI state code that this collection belongs to.

id.description: Stable identifier. LGD numeric code (preferred) or Wikipedia URL slug (fallback).

lgd_code.description: LGD numeric district code (Local Government Directory, Ministry of Panchayati Raj). Optional. Join key against datasets/boundaries/in/geojson/india-districts.geojson features (`dist_lgd` property). When id_source=lgd this duplicates id; when id_source=wikipedia this is the LGD bridge added by tools/lgd/backfill_lgd_codes.py.

created_on.description: Date the district was constituted, when known.

split_from.description: Parent district ids (same id_source) if this district was carved out.
